issues: signal logic uses 'date' column but spec requires weekly frequency and week-over-week change
no explicit handling of weekly aggregation or ensuring weekly frequency
position_start_date is stored as attribute but no persistence or state management shown
signal logic returns 'RISK_ON', 'RISK_OFF', 'HOLD' which is acceptable, but logic for exit condition uses latest_change < 5% which matches spec
allocation logic uses 5% per signal which matches spec, but no enforcement of max_total_exposure 20%
